## [00:00 - 00:52]

This is a workshop that is unlike anything I've ever experienced before because it's not just an educational content lecture, it's action and it's application and it's connection. I think that's the biggest part of it is there's connection here. There is no price that I wouldn't pay to come to this workshop. It's worth its weight in gold because of what this is going to do differently for me and what it is already doing differently for the way that I connect things. You have to attend these workshops. I'm going to attend again and I'm going to get my boss to attend and employees to attend this workshop because it's changing how I think and I want to share that with everybody else and I appreciate so much that Venn is sharing that with us here today.
